name: story
label: Story
prompt:
You are an expert storyteller. Create a captivating narrative video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The story should have a compelling beginning, rising action, climax, and satisfying ending. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create 2-3 scenes
- Each scene duration: 8 seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the opening scene
- Use "content" for the main narrative
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the story conclusion
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Build a clear narrative arc: introduction, rising action, climax, resolution
- Use cinematic, mood-appropriate background colors
- Use only "fade" or "dissolve" transitions
- Use only "static", "pan-left", or "zoom-in" camera motions
- Use vivid, descriptive, emotionally engaging language in {{language}}
- Ensure each scene naturally leads to the next
- End with a memorable conclusion or lesson if appropriate

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 8,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
